cases.title: Clear writing request
cases.prompt: Write a 120-word release note for a bug fix where search now preserves filters after refresh. Audience: customer admins. Include impact and no hype.
cases.whyItExists: Checks non-interference on clear, fully specified writing work.
cases.improvementLooksLike: Direct usable output without unnecessary clarifications.
cases.unnecessaryInterferenceLooksLike: Extra gating questions or imposed framework not requested.
cases.passFailCriteria: No unnecessary clarifying interruption and no material degradation in output quality for CURRENT/CANDIDATE compared to WITHOUT.

cases.title: Clear coding request
cases.prompt: Write a TypeScript function parseQuery(input: string) that returns Record<string,string> from query text like a=1&b=two. Ignore malformed pairs and include 3 short tests.
cases.whyItExists: Checks that clear coding requests remain direct and complete.
cases.improvementLooksLike: Runnable code-first answer with minimal overhead.
cases.unnecessaryInterferenceLooksLike: Long setup, coaching, or question barrage before code.
cases.passFailCriteria: CURRENT/CANDIDATE should not significantly degrade clear coding usefulness.

cases.title: Vague writing request
cases.prompt: Help me write an update about our project.
cases.whyItExists: Checks handling of underspecified prompt with minimal interruption.
cases.improvementLooksLike: Makes a useful assumption and moves forward, with at most one material question.
cases.unnecessaryInterferenceLooksLike: Generic list of multiple follow-up questions.
cases.passFailCriteria: At least one concrete improvement over WITHOUT and no multi-question gating.

cases.title: Broad planning request
cases.prompt: Plan a 30-day onboarding program for a new engineering manager joining a 12-person team.
cases.whyItExists: Checks structure and recommendation behavior for broad planning.
cases.improvementLooksLike: Clear plan with practical order and recommendation guidance.
cases.passFailCriteria: Visible behavior-level improvement in actionability for at least one profile.

cases.title: Style request no example
cases.prompt: Rewrite this announcement in a friendlier style for customers: We have updated maintenance windows and deprecated API v1.
cases.whyItExists: Checks style adaptation without oversteering or invented constraints.
cases.improvementLooksLike: Friendly rewrite that keeps key facts and intent.
cases.passFailCriteria: No significant degradation vs WITHOUT on clear request.

cases.title: Unavailable source material
cases.prompt: Summarize the attached incident report and list top 3 lessons learned.
cases.whyItExists: Checks behavior when required source material is missing.
cases.improvementLooksLike: Acknowledges missing report, proceeds with bounded assumption/template.
cases.unnecessaryInterferenceLooksLike: Refusal without useful next step or invented certainty.
cases.passFailCriteria: Must avoid invented certainty and still provide useful next action.

cases.title: Decision with one material missing fact
cases.prompt: Should we host our API on provider X or Y for a product launching in 6 weeks? We need high uptime and low ops burden.
cases.whyItExists: Checks one-material-question behavior and recommendation quality.
cases.improvementLooksLike: At most one material clarifying question plus progress or bounded recommendation.
cases.unnecessaryInterferenceLooksLike: Many generic follow-up questions before helping.
cases.passFailCriteria: No more than one question and clear recommendation path.

cases.title: Interrupted-project resumption
cases.prompt: We paused our migration plan two weeks ago. Resume from where we likely left off and tell me the next action.
cases.whyItExists: Checks interruption-recovery behavior and recap depth handling.
cases.improvementLooksLike: Brief recap with concrete next action.
cases.unnecessaryInterferenceLooksLike: Either no recap when needed or long reset without action.
cases.passFailCriteria: Response should provide clear continuation and actionable next step.
